2025 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Recruiting is no longer just about filling roles. It’s about
maximizing intern yield. Internships are the first real test of
whether students see a company as transparent, supportive,
and worth investing their careers in.
This is the new reality of recruiting.
In order to gain a deeper understanding of what students
experience during the recruitment cycle, Rewriting the Code
surveyed 3,400 students who participated in recruiting. We
surveyed students not just to gather numbers, but to highlight
what truly builds (or erodes) trust during recruiting.
This report dives into each part of the recruiting experience,
both an intern and new grad perspective, from application,
preparation, interview, offer, and acceptance, with a close
look at reneges.

THE NEW REALITY
OF RECRUITING

AI’s influence on recruiting, fears about automation, economic TO TURN INSIGHTS INTO ACTION
volatility, and rising costs of living have reshaped how students
and new grads approach their first jobs. To succeed in this new
reality, companies must not only understand the mechanics of
the recruiting process, but also the people navigating it, their AND BUILD A RECRUITING PROCESS
concerns, motivations, and long-term goals.
At RTC, data is at the heart of everything we do. We equip our
partners with year-round insights into how our members think
WHERE EVERYONE WINS.
and act, and provide opportunities for them to meet members
themselves. The result? A better experience for applicants,
recruiters, and companies alike.
